Hi @MF-ITuser! 👋

Thank you for the detailed device interview! This is very helpful.

**Device Analysis:**
- **Model:** TS1201 (Moes UFO-R11 IR Universal Remote)
- **Manufacturer:** _TZ3290_ot6ewjvmejq5ekhl
- **Type:** Battery-powered IR blaster/universal remote

**Clusters detected:**
- 60672 (0xED00) - Tuya proprietary IR cluster
- 57348 (0xE004) - Tuya proprietary cluster
- 6 (onOff) - Standard ZCL
- 1 (powerConfiguration) - Battery reporting

This is an **IR blaster device** that allows controlling IR devices (TVs, ACs, etc.) via Zigbee. It's a more complex device type that requires:

1. IR code learning/programming functionality
2. IR code database or learning mode
3. Custom cluster handling for the IR transmission

**Current status:** This device type is not yet supported in the Universal Tuya Zigbee app. It would require a dedicated driver implementation.

I've noted this device request and will consider adding support in a future update. In the meantime, if you have any documentation about the Tuya IR protocol or Z2M/ZHA implementations, that would be very helpful!

Thank you for your patience! 🙏

Best regards,
Dylan

Hi! 👋

This device is **already supported** in [dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee) (Universal Tuya Zigbee fork) — **v5.11.14** with 138 drivers and 5,579+ fingerprints.

**Install the latest test version:**
https://homey.app/a/com.dlnraja.tuya.zigbee/test/

**Community forum for support:**
https://community.homey.app/t/app-pro-universal-tuya-zigbee-device-app-test/140352

After installing, delete and re-pair your device. If it still doesn't work, please share a **diagnostic report ID** (device Settings > Create diagnostic report) and a **Homey Developer Tools interview** (https://tools.developer.homey.app).

<!-- tuya-triage-bot -->
Hi! The fingerprint(s) `_TZ3290_ot6ewjvmej` are **not yet in our database**. We've logged them for the next release.

To speed up support, please provide:
1. Device interview from https://tools.developer.homey.app
2. Z2M/ZHA device page link
3. Blakadder page (https://zigbee.blakadder.com)

**Forum:** https://community.homey.app/t/app-pro-universal-tuya-zigbee-device-app-test/140352

Hi Dylan,

1. I installed the new version of the "Universal Tuya Zigbee" app from the Homey App Store
2. I also Re-pair IR blaster

but it but it still doesn't work for IR code learning and transmission.
